privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real EC2 CPU utilization data originating from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) realAWSCloudwatch dataset (specifically ec2_cpu_utilization_5f5533.csv mapped to ec2_cpu_utilization_1.csv). This data is ingested into Graphite under the metric path 'servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization'. No explicit metadata claims were found in the task configuration.
